Arabinda Saha

I turn scattered data, workflows, and program evidence into dashboards and tools people can act on.

Start a conversation Download Resume

01. About

This site collects the systems, assessments, and product experiments I have built while learning how people make sense of information.

At Lakshmikumaran & Sridharan, I work as a Data Consultant on internal dashboards and analytics workflows for matter/case performance, revenue indicators, lawyer-level performance, and leadership review.

Before that, I led school-program operations at Edudigm across assessments, STEM initiatives, LMS workflows, PM SHRI programs, and large-scale student activities. That work made one thing obvious: clarity breaks when evidence, ownership, and timelines live in too many places.

My current focus is to turn that complexity into business intelligence systems, dashboards, and trackers that are easier to read and easier to act on.

My foundation combines an M.Sc. in Mathematics from Jadavpur University with a 6th-year diploma in Fine Arts. The math gives me the structure. The art training keeps the final dashboard or page calm, balanced, and legible.

My Philosophy

Make the work easier to see.

01

The problem

Most teams are not short on effort. The harder problem is seeing the same facts in the same place: what changed, what needs attention, and what should happen next.

02

The method

I start with the decision the view needs to support. Who is looking at it? What are they comparing? What would make the next conversation sharper?

03

The result

That becomes a dashboard, tracker, assessment, or structured report. The format changes with the problem. The standard stays the same: the person reading it should be able to act on it immediately.

02. Experience

Analytics and dashboard work at a national law firm, preceded by several years of education analytics, assessment design, and program delivery at scale.

Data Consultant @ Lakshmikumaran & Sridharan

Feb 2026 – Present

  • Defined the metric framework with leadership for partner, associate, and firm-level annual performance reviews, shifting evaluation from revenue-only to multi-dimensional contribution tracking across every level of the firm.
  • Wrote SQL queries against PostgreSQL operational tables, built the analysis pipeline in Python with Pandas and Plotly, and designed the Power BI dashboards now used in review cycles.
  • Translated fragmented matter, revenue, and lawyer-performance data into structured views that changed what gets measured and discussed in leadership review meetings.

Functional view only; internal data protected.

Program Head – School Programs @ Edudigm

Dec 2023 – Jan 2026

  • Led school-program delivery and stakeholder coordination across 5+ partner schools, 1,500+ students, and 60+ teachers, building the operational structure that made consistent delivery across dispersed locations possible.
  • Built and scaled Competitive Edge, a diagnostic assessment analytics framework using Bloom's taxonomy and LOTS-HOTS, across ~1,000 students and ~10 schools.
  • Piloted a career assessment workflow for 500+ students from Classes 9-12 at KV Kharagpur.
  • Scaled Stellar Space Quiz to 600+ schools across 6 states, with finals at Gyan Manch and IIT Kharagpur Research Park.
  • Coordinated PM SHRI, LMS, STEM, and robotics workflows across partner schools, building documentation systems and delivery structures that gave each school a clear view of its own progress.

Built depth in education analytics, stakeholder coordination, decentralized operations, and program-scale delivery.

Subject Matter Expert – Mathematics @ Edudigm

Jun 2022 – Nov 2023

  • Delivered CBSE Boards and JEE-oriented Mathematics content for Classes 9-12.
  • Designed chapter-wise assessments, revision modules, and practice sets.
  • Contributed to early curriculum and assessment systems later used in school-program delivery.

Kept brief: the analytical and assessment work from this period fed directly into the frameworks built during the Program Head role.

03. Work

A few systems, assessments, and products I’ve built to make information easier to understand and use.

Internal Dashboards · Performance Dashboards · Leadership Views

LKS Internal Performance Dashboard Work

Defined the metric framework for partner, associate, and firm-level annual reviews. Wrote SQL queries against PostgreSQL operational tables, built the analysis pipeline in Python and Pandas, and designed the Power BI dashboards now used in review cycles.

The work covered matter and case performance, revenue indicators, and lawyer-level contribution: analytical surfaces that had not existed as structured views before.

Functional view only; internal data protected.

Multidimensional Data Modeling · Assessment Analytics · School Analytics

Competitive Edge: Diagnostic Assessment Analytics

Designed a diagnostic assessment framework using Bloom's taxonomy and LOTS-HOTS classification to make student performance easier to compare by class, topic, and cognitive level.

Scaled across ~1,000 students and ~10 schools, enabling learning-gap identification, remediation planning, and school-level academic feedback.

Presented as a case study at CBSE Sahodaya 2024.

  • ~1,000 Students
  • ~10 Schools
  • Bloom's Taxonomy
  • LOTS-HOTS
  • Learning-gap Analysis
  • CBSE Sahodaya 2024

Student Assessment · Career Guidance · School Views

Career Assessment Tool

Designed and piloted a structured career assessment workflow for Classes 9-12, turning student-interest data into school-level guidance conversations.

Piloted with 500+ students at KV Kharagpur.

The pilot surfaced patterns in student interest and aptitude that the school had not previously collected in structured form.

  • 500+ Students
  • Classes 9-12
  • KV Kharagpur
  • Student Views

Other Noteworthy Work

Stellar Space Quiz

Program Operations · Participation Tracking · Academic Events

Built and scaled a National Space Day quiz with ISRO merchandise partnership through participation outreach, coordination infrastructure, and event execution across 600+ schools and 6 states.

  • 600+ Schools
  • 6 States
  • ISRO Merchandise Partner
  • Gyan Manch Finals
  • IIT Kharagpur Research Park

School Programs, STEM & LMS Work

Program Systems · LMS Workflows · STEM Education

Ran PM SHRI, STEM, and LMS workflows across partner schools, building the documentation systems and delivery structures that gave each school visibility into its own program progress.

  • 5+ Partner Schools
  • 1,500+ Students
  • 60+ Teachers
  • LMS Workflows
  • STEM / Robotics

Active prototype · built for deployment

School Program Command Centre: Active Prototype

Web Product · Active Prototype · Education BI

Built a dashboard-led prototype for school-program tracking, covering assessment summaries, documentation workflows, and teacher-level ownership views. Synthetic data throughout: the goal was to demonstrate the analytical logic cleanly before live school data is introduced.

  • React
  • Node.js
  • Dashboard Design
  • Program Analytics
  • Education BI
View project ↗

Writing-first journal · live app

Reflections: Private Writing Journal

Web Product · Private Journal · Calm Interface

Built a private writing journal with user-owned notes, clear privacy controls, and optional AI writing insights, designed to surface only when useful, never by default.

  • React
  • Tailwind CSS
  • Supabase
  • Private Writing
  • Writing Insights
View project ↗

Intro-page studio · live app

Parichay: Private Intro Page Studio

Web Product · Intro Pages · Visibility Controls

Built a privacy-first intro page tool for sharing relationship, work, boundary, and difficult-conversation context with clear included, private, and omitted states.

  • React
  • Supabase
  • Privacy-first UX
  • Visibility Architecture
  • Shareable Intros
View project ↗

04. Contact
